resources.string: Metikaanirio ja Mûtumîri na Sheria cia siri

Welcome to Game Space! We attach great importance to your personal information and privacy. In order to protect your rights and comply with relevant regulatory requirements, we explain to you as follows: This Privacy Policy will help you understand the following contents:
1.How We Collect and Use Your Personal Information
2.How We Store and Protect Your Personal Information
3.How We Share, Transfer and Disclose Your Personal Information
4.How Your Personal Information is Transferred Across Borders
5.Your Rights to Your Personal Information
6.How We Handle the Personal Information of Children
7.Third-Party Service Providers and Services
8.Supplement and Update of the Policy
9.How to Contact Us
The Terms of Use will help you understand the following contents:
1.Game Space and its Services
2.Restrictions on the use of This Software and Service
3.Intellectual Property; Ownership
4.Considerations on Your Use of This Software and Service
5.About Updates
6.Software and Services Provided by Third Parties
7.Fees and Advertisement
8.Termination and Breach of Contract
9.Indemnification, DISCLAIMERS, LIMITATION OF LIABILITIES, Governing Laws and Dispute Resolution and Miscellaneous
Itu tonga kiri linki aja nthiguru kuthoma %1$s na %2$s.
Hali ya atîatî ikanenkanira into kuringana na mucetho na witi ngugi bwa thimu.
Onania WhatsApp na ntûmwa cia mesija kiri njira ya barranji
Igutonyua ndene, itiumba gwikira mwanki thaai
Ûchanja na Mûkila ywa Mîchetho gukanyiyia thimu kugia murutira na gukoongera uturo bwa ikara.

Riria thimu yaku igwatithenue na chanja orinjino igita ria mucetho, mugao jwa mwanki jugakuruka ikara kunenkera thimu mwanki oo rimwe, bubu bukanyiyia kuchamuka kwa thimu na bwongeere uturo bwa ikara.
Ûchanja na Mûkila gukuumbithua. Gwikirwa mwanki bwega gwa ikara gukanyia
Ûchanja na Mûkila gukuumbithua. Gwikirwa mwanki gwa ikara kukurungikwa
Ya kworia mwanki riria mwanki jukugia
Gichunchi kia inya itumiri gwikira ikara mwanki
Anjria gwikira mwanki nyuma ya ikara gwita nthi ya mianka ya wikiri mwanki.
Kugarura rangi gutethagia kumenya biria bigwita kiri mucetho, kwongera kaanya ga kuumbana
Garura rangi cia mbica cia PUBG
Garura rangi cia mbica cia PUBG
Terethia ndeene kuuma kiri panelo ya gushughulika kugwatia kîoni kia Ûme
Banga Injini ya ET kiri uthondeki bwa mucetho
Ûkauma Hali ya gwîka mwanki waumbitia Kûrûngamira Lebo ya Micetho ya Mûtandao.
Mîgambo ya Manjîki ya gûtumîrwa ûtheri
Taara apps 2 kuumbithia Ndirisha ya Kûelea riria uri kiri mucetho.
Apps 2 icio ciumbithitue ni Ndirisha ya Kûelea
Apps 2 nikwendekana kiri ndirisha ya Kûelea
Thondeka nkuruki mutandao riria ugucetha micetho. Atumiri baberu no batumire utheri ntunku imwe
Garura mugambo jwaku uri ki micetho
Tega kanya ka musetho, utumiri bwa ndata.
Egereria kenda wonania Hali ya Mûchetho
Gukurukithua kwa musetho zwa mathaa 2 zathingatene. Nogoka mbere wenderea.
Gukurukithua kwa mathaa 4 zothe za gusetha narua. Nogoka mbere wenderea.
Mathaa 2 jathira za gucetha ûtî kûnogoka kana mathaa 4 kîrî mîcetho yothe
Rîrîa yûûmbithitue, njîra înkui cia mîcetho ikaithwa kîrî kîoni kia mucii. Rugûrira na ûrungamîre mîcetho yoonthe kîrî %1$s kûtheria kîoni kia mucii na kwithîra na ûmenyeria bwa gûchetha.
%1$s nîkwenda rûûtha rwa Matangazo gûsukuma matangazo rîrîa mîcetho îmîerû yoogerwi.
Kûûmbithia Huduma ya Sitoo ya Mûcetho
Gûtî %1$s Stratinji cia %2$s. Nowîte kîrî %3$s Kuuma kîrî mûcetho kwongera imwe (îtîkîrîtue kîrî mîcetho ya mwonekano jwa kûmama akî).
Taara app ya mucetho kiri listi. App iria iratarwa ikamatuka kiri hali ya mûchetho.
Gugutetheeria gusida kiri mustari wa mbere
Binga imenyithia lakini tii cia kurirwa thimu na alamu
Gutara gwa thaa cia kuriuka oome ya mucetho.
Iejana macookio jena mûrurumo kîrî itengo bimwe bia mûcetho
Thondeka uriti ngugi bwa CPU na GPU kwongera uriti ngugi bwa mucetho
Ikuadijasti kiri hali njega. Lakini thikiiria kiri %1$s.
Nyiyia weru bwa kioni gukaria kwona
Ithirwa na kaanya ga kunooka ga kunookia meetho jaku
Ongeera weru bwa kioni gukaria kwona
Ebera kumama na mugongo igita riri raaja riria ugutumira thimu yaku
Gwatia irikania bia ugima na ukaria bia meetho, njira ya gukara nthi, njira ya kurega kugwatwa ukombo.
Sauti ya thimu cia matu iri iguru mono
Ongeera micetho iria wendete mono kiri Game Space
Gita makinya jagie sauti nkuruki na kaumo ga sauti ithondeki
Mîseto yonthe kiri uriti nkugi igasetwa kairi na hali ya mbere.
Mbere yombithua, Îtuo kîa Kûthima Mûthutira ywa Mîchetho kurungamira murutira jwa gucetha no junyiyie murutira jwa thimu na kwongera igita ria gucetha.
Na uume garura ithimi bia mucetho gutigira gucetha gukwega igita riri raaja
Îtuo kîa Kûthima Mûthutira ywa Mîchetho
Kûrûngamira Lebo ya Micetho ya Mûtandao ikumbithwa. Muthutira wa divici no wiite na iuru.
Nyiyia gûtonga gûkûrûkîra linki yûjûri ya tekinoloji ya kûrungamîra, îndî bûû bûkongera mûrutîra jwa masini na bûnyiyie ûtûro bwa mbeteri.
Indexi cia iguru irionania ûtumîri mwanki bwa nthiguru na utuuro buraja bwa ikara.
Indexi cia iguru irionania vindio injega mono.
Indexi cia iguru irionania kubanganua gukwega kwa mucetho.
Indexi cia iguru irionania mwinamo jwa gwitia kwa murutira.
已开启极致帧率，将为您提供120fps游戏体验
开启后将为你提供120fps的极致游戏体验，但可能导致发热问题。
Kurigiria Gutonga gutibuui nuntu bwa monaniria ja gucwaa njira
Oria \"Yukia Mbica ya Kioni na Ciara 3\"
Riria \"Yukia Mbica ya Kioni na Ciara 3\" kworetue, utiumba Kujukia mbica ya kioni na biara 3.
Riria ugucetha micetho ugikaira mwanki, Ûchanja kwa Ûme ikanyiyia inya ya wikiri mwanki bwa ikara, inyiyie kinya kurutira kwa thimu na yoongere utuuro bwa ikara.
Kubangania murutira jwa gwikira mwanki gukumbithua
Tonga kiri mbica ya app kumiongera
Kûrûngamira Lebo ya Micetho ya Mûtandao
Buithia spindi ya kûrûngamîra macookio gûkûrûkîra kûbuithia buru linki ya gûtonga na kwonania, îndî bûû bûgatûma thimu ichamûke.
Mantu jaja jaria aja nthii jario kiriugwe.
Bangania mucetho na Frame Rate gwita \"Iguru\" na umbithie untu buu.
No wanjirie ngugi ya kumapu ya mucetho na kuinya mbatoni cia sauti +/-.
Kwagirithia Grafiki buti aja kiri hali ya Kûmenyera Meetho.
已开启优化功耗，将为您提供流畅60fps游戏体验
开启后将为你优化发热和功耗，并提供60fps的高帧游戏体验
Riîtwa rîrîerû rîtîbatere kwîthîra rîî rîmwe na orinjino
Riîtwa ria gûtonya rîtîagîri. Tafatharî geria kaîrî

Na ûûme menya gûntû kwa oparitioni cia mîcetho mwanya na ûbuithe ûria kwagîri kûnenkanîra ûmenyeria bûthongi bwa gûcetha. Rîrîa îjî yûûmbithitue, gûntû gwa gûtonga gûkamenyekana kîrî mûguanano jwa mbere jwa oo îgita ria gûcetha.
Nyuma ya kworia Wi-Fi, intaneti ya mobairo igatumika.
Ithongomagia mutegere jwa kuringithia kiri gintu; Inya ya kuringithia nou ikwoongerwa riti.

"Wega bwa kuringithia ya mucetho. Kung'aniria na nyuma gukanyiyia uthongi bwa mbica riria ukwoongera uriti ngugi. (Kugarura kwinyagia mbica riria ukwoongera witi ngugi; Kugarura na nthi kwoongeraa uugi bwa mbica)"
"Ng'aniiria nuntu bwa mbica inthongi kana rwiro rwa speeding."
Masini ya kurekondi niigutumirwa kiri app ingi. Tafathari inga app mbere
Untu bunthe kiri %1$s bukethirwa burio kiri mucetho juu nyuma ya kujudownload.
Ukwona VIP ya utheri ona mbere
Roria Ûtumîri bwa CPU kunyiyia kwinama kwa uthiu na gutigirwa nyuma
Join us to enjoy magic sound transformation privileges
Gûtî ûgwatithanio bwa netiwaki. Tafatharî tega hali ya netiwaki
Garûra mûgambo jwaku kîrî mîcetho ya thaa ciongwa.
Noûsambase maoni jaku gûkûrûkîra %1$s kana waranîrie natwî kîrî %2$s.
Magic Button itikiragia ugwe kumapu ngugi kiri kioni kiri mbatoni ya sauti ya njara, riu kunyiya ngugi ya mbatoni ya sauti ya gusetha.
Inya bûraya na ukururie mbatoni ya + kana - kiri mwanya zuria ukwenda kumapu na gusosera
Seta ngugi ya mbatoni ya sauti ya musetho
Ngugi ya kumapu mbatoni ya sauti kiri kuthirwa kwa uringi. Mbatoni cia sauti ititumirwa kairi kunyia kana kwongera sauti, indi nowikie kioni iguru kuthithia hu.
Rete iguru SmartPanel na umitumire kunyiya kana kuongera sauti
Niatia mpumba kuongera kana kunyia sauti riria Magic Button igwetue?
Inya bûraya na ukurururie \"+\" kiri mbatoni ya mwanki
No ugwatie kana ukoria kumapu ya o mbatoni ya sauti, na ukainya mbere gwikira ngugi ya mbatoni ciothe.

No unyiye ngugi ya mbatoni ya sauti kiri musetho. Kwa ngerekano, kururia mbatoni ya \"+\" kiri mbica mwaka kiri mbatoni ya mwaki kioni kia gusetha,riu wike akiba ya muheto na wikire musetho. Riu nouinye mbatoni ya iguru ya sauti kwambiria kukia mbica.
Gusensi kwa iguru niongeraa utongi, riria yanyiwua niongeraa ung’anîîru na ikanyiyia guchumburwa na gutonga kwa urongo.
Riria iruguki, inenkanaira urungamiri bwa micetho na ninyiagia urungamiri bwa kaanya ga gwitikiria.
O uria gwitikiria kuri iguru, nou gwitikiria gwa guterethia kuri iguru. O uria gwitikiria kuri nthi, nou gwitikiria gwa guterethia kuri nthi.
Njira ya kumenyithania ntumwa riria wi mucethoni.
Wagîru bwa îguru bûûmbithagia gûntû kuungwa kwa into binini, na wagîru bwa nthî bûnyiyagia gîsensi kia irûngamîri îndî ikabuithia ûng’anîru bwa kûrita ngûgî.

"Ibwega nîûntû bwa gûtûîtîkîrîa na gûtumîra into na huduma cietû. Kenda tûkûnenkera into na huduma, itûkwenda gûkinyîra intaneti, tûkeenda ndûûtha kuuma kîrî thimu yaku, na gûtumîra ndata imwe ciaku: 1. Kûlingana na rûûtha rwaku, tûkajûkia habarî cia akaunti yaku gûtonya. 2. Kûlingana na rûûtha rwaku, tûkajûkia habarî cia onda yaku na namba ya thimu kûrikia kûria na kûnenkanira huduma cia kûrihira iria igwitaniria. Sheria iria tûthithagia habarî ciaku ii ûmenyo bwaku kana kîrîîkanîro nagwe. Watonga Îtîkîria, ikwonania ûgwitîkîra masharti jetû jaria jandîkwi kîrî Metikaanirio ja Mûtumîri na sheria cia siri."
Wainya ÎTÎKÎRIA, ugwîtîkîria mîtaratara yugi kîrî %s na %s.
Utikagwatithanie kiwitire na Wi-Fi iria ugutumira netiwaki cia mobairo.
Na uume taara Wi-Fi na intaneti ya mobairo kunyiyia listi cia netiwaki. Intaneti ya mobairo noitumirwe inya riria netiwaki ya Wi-Fi igwatithenue.
Kiri guchaguranetiwaki ya mucetho wa thaai na mucetho jumwega kuethia Netiwaki Iyii cia Wi-Fi Bwea Caiti tekinoloji.
No network connection. Please check your network and %s
Ntûmwa cia apps iria listi Îtîkîiîrîtue itionania thaa cia mucetho.
Ndirisha ya Kûelea itigwatiri ni makarika ya thaa iji ya sini
Onania WhatsApp na ntûmwa cia mesija kiri kioni kia micetho kiri njira ya barranji
Watonga ÎTÎKÎRIA, ûgwîtîkîra masharti jetû jaria jandîkwi kîrî %s na %s.
Watonga ÎTÎKÎRIA, ûgwîtîkîra masharti jetû jaria jandîkwi kîrî Kîrîikaniro kia Mûtumîri na Sheria cia Siri.

Ibwega nîûntû bwa wîîtîkio bwaku na gûtumîra into na huduma cietû. Kûejana into na huduma cietû, nîbatere gûkinyîra intaneti na kûewa ndûûtha ii thimu yaku, kûûthûrania na gûtumîra ndata imwe ciaku. Gîtûmi kia kûthithia ikûbwithia ûrîa mûtumîri akuigua na gûkûnenkera huduma. Mûsingi jwa gîîsheria juria tûthithagia ndata ciaku na ûmenyo bwa ndata bwaku bwa sheria iria îgûtumîka.
This keeps it in view until you unpin. Touch & hold Back and Overview to unpin.
To unpin this app, swipe up & hold

Hali ya Uriti Ngui ikoongera witi ngugi bwa thimu na nibu bwega kiri micetho ya gucindana. Riria yumbithitue, ikaleta mbica inthongi, indi ikoongera ûtumîri mwanki na murutira kiri masini. Ikwendekithitue gucethera kiri guntu gutina murutira.

"Gutii ruutha rwa bata.
Itu tonga \"Mîseto\"-\"Ruutha\"-Rugurira ruutha."
"We need some of the permissions you rejected or the system failed to apply failed, please manually set to the page authorize, otherwise the function can't be used normally!"
"You have rejected us to apply for authorization, please agree to authorization, otherwise the function can't be used normally!"
Tonga gutega %1$s na %2$s. Na njira ya gutonga \"Gwitikiria\" uritikiria mîseto ya ruutha na gwitikaniria.
Hali ya Gwîka Mwanki ikanyiyia hali ya ûriti ngûgî na yaramie ûtûûro bwa mbeteri. Yaagiri kiri mîcetho iria itikwenda wega bwa iguru bwa mbica.
Ongera uturo bwa ikara nkuruki ya %1$s
%1$sIkambiira kurita ngugi wambiira kairi mucetho, itu ambiira kairi mucetho.
Kuthithia eku bwega zaidi gugatigithwa riria musetho jukambilia
Kuthondekwa kwa mwanya kwa mucetho juu gukombithua nyuma ya mucetho jwanjiria kairi
Garûra mûgambo kagita koongwa kîrî mîcetho. Îkîra %1$s.
Gûtî ndata irio. Tafatharî geria kaîrî thaa ingî
Itha efekti cia weerû cia uuma kûthithia mbica cia mûcetho cia ûûma.
Mahitia ja gwîkîra vindio. Tafatharî geria kaîrî thaa ingî

%1$s Ikumenya kuchinchia kunene kwa mutandao jwa mucetho kiri mucetho muthiru, na %2$d kisi cia gutigirwa nyuma kwa mutandao na gukiriria kwa mutandao kwa %3$d ms. Kumbithia kûmatûkia Netiwaki ya Mîchetho jwa mucetho nugutethie kunyia gukiriria gwita %4$d ms na kwongere rwiro rwa mutandao na %5$d%%
Oria hali ya Mûchetho kiri mucetho juu?
Gutumira sistem gukwenda kumbithua kairi nikenda kuriiriria kuuma ki makosa kiri mucetho.
Oria utheri wa kiwithire na uadijasti
Riria Hali ya Mûchetho yii on, oria utheri kabisa nikenda gutii na wanangiko.
Onania Kîoni kîa Mûtethia wa Mûchetho nuntu bwa utumiri buthongi bwa mucetho.
Seta app kîrî Hali ya Mûchetho.
Kîwango kia îgûrû kia stratinji gîgûkinyîrwa
Gîta stratinji %1$s kîrî Kîoni kîa Mûtethia wa Mûchetho ûria yoonenue aja. Noûtûme kana ûgasambasa stratinji.
Îkûrema gûtûma stratinji. Tafatharî tega kwethîra mondero nîgwîtanîria
Stratinji îkûretwa ndene bûbwega. Tafatharî tega mûcetho jûria jûgwitania
Koobia riîtwa ria gûtonya ria %1$s na ûrîsambase na acoore baku. Mondero iria ciîtîkîritue ii %2$s stratinji: %3$s
Woria mwanki bubwega riria ugucetha micetho
Gwata na ukuchie iguru guchinchia antu au.
Gwata na ukuchie kugarura antu au
Terethia ndeene kugwatia kîoni kia Ûme na kurugura apps kiri ndirisha cia Kûelea.
Na inya nenkanira ficha Îthongi ja waandiki bwa igita riu na gutaura kiri kioni kionthe ndeene ya magita jamwe.
Na mpwi rugura apps kiri ndirisha cia Kûelea
Mantu ja hali ya Mûchetho jatiumbithitue kiri bioni birekenie
Garûrîra kandi ya laini ya intaneti
Ukumia Buremu ya Ûme mwanka 120 FPS
Kuethia Netiwaki Iyii cia Wi-Fi Bwea Caiti bwa netiwaki
Failed to boost. Please check your network and try again
Giki noo kiongeere Ûtumîri mwanki & muthutira jwa thimu.
Gutii ugwatithanio bwa netiwaki. Tafatharî tega netiwaki yaku na ugerie kairi
Tafatharî îkîra Kandi ya laini na ûgerie kaîrî
Gûtonya gûkûthûka. Tafatharî tonya ndene kaîrî.
Thithia kûmenyera kwa ûrûngamîri na gûcookia kûlingana na mandekithirua jaku na levo ya ûmenyo.
Gîcookio kia gûtonga ikia kûmenyera nkûrûki, yagîri kîrî mîcetho ya MOBA.
Oparitioni niyagûcookia nkûrûki, yagîri kîrî mîcetho ya gûshuti.
Gîcookio kia gûtonga ikia kûmenyera na jagîri nkûrûki, jagîri kîrî mîcetho imiingî.
Ongera utegi na kurigiria imenyithia kugutanga.
Terethia na ugwatire kuuma kiri mithia ya kioni kurugura mûtethia wa Vindio
Atumiri baberu no bagwate ntuku %d cia VIP ya utheri
Ûsirika bwa Paki ya Mûgambo ya meetikaniirio ya Huduma
Karibu kiri Mîchetho ya Inya ya Xunyou
